growth_records.medium: Optimised LMO-812 (defined marine medium) + 10 mM glucose

mfa.note: PEP->OAA absent in W43; PYR carboxylation

growth_records.cite: Yuxue Yang et al. Metabolic Flux Analysis Reveals Entner-Doudoroff Pathway Dominance in Heterotrophic Deep-Sea Bacterial Isolates. Environmental Microbiology Reports (2026). DOI:10.1111/1758-2229.70379. [PMC13261371]
growth_records.method: reported (max specific growth rate from OD600, 0.084 +/- 0.002 /h); td CALCULATED=0.693/0.084=8.25 h
growth_records.snippet: 0.084 +/- 0.002 h-1 ... W43 0.89 +/- 0.24 (Glucose consumption umol/h) ... Biomass yield 1.07 +/- 0.16
growth_records.notes: mu 0.084/h; td=0.693/0.084=8.25 h. Glucose consumption 0.89 umol/h. Reported Yxs=1.07 g CDW/g glucose is >1 (physically implausible for pure heterotrophic growth; flag as printed - biomass composition assumed as P. putida since not measured, and glucose was supplied at minimum-growth concentration, so apparent yield may reflect additional C from medium/inoculum carryover). PEP carboxylase reaction absent in genome (constrained off). Temp 20C, glucose 10 mM. Harvest 85 h, OD600 0.57. No secretion products quantified.

carbon_growth.medium: Optimised LMO-812 (defined marine medium) + 10 mM glucose
carbon_growth.citation: Yuxue Yang et al. Metabolic Flux Analysis Reveals Entner-Doudoroff Pathway Dominance in Heterotrophic Deep-Sea Bacterial Isolates. Environmental Microbiology Reports (2026). DOI:10
